vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #899

plan.title: Installer fails on a clean Windows machine: reinstalls git, then exits without completing

narratives.Description: Installer fails on a clean Windows machine: reinstalls git, then exits without completing

references.title: Issue #899: Installer fails on a clean Windows machine: reinstalls git, then exits without completing

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.

x-swarm-guidance.rationale: Tactical fix for the current Go binary installer's stale-PATH probe (cmd/deft-install/git.go:70-73). gitAvailable() resolves git via exec.LookPath against the process's startup PATH snapshot; after installGitWindows runs the silent installer the registry PATH is updated but the running installer's PATH is unchanged, so the Re-check after install always fails. Fix introduces refreshPathFromRegistry() Go helper (Windows build tag) called before the initial gitAvailable() and after installGitWindows succeeds. Shares registry-PATH-refresh primitive with #902.
